---
title: "Florence Nightingale"
---

## Florence Nightingale

**Dates:** (1820-1910)

### Description

medical reformer

### Letters

- Letter from 2 June 1868
- Letter from Jan 31st 1866
- Letter from Sept 28th [1864]
- Letter from Sept. 27 1864
- Letter from Sept 17th [1864]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
